title: pygmaeopremna nana
intro: Pygmaeopremna nana, also known as the Dwarf Premna or Dwarf Woodmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pygmaeopremna nana include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches and body aches, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pygmaeopremna nana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
